items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow gas-pump dashboard icon visually matches low-fuel warning; top machine match q0621 has 'fuel in tank reached minimum' as correct. Local option A = low fuel.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Scene ambiguous for overtaking (pedestrians/crosswalk, lane layout). Machine suggests q0255 (cannot overtake) but score/modality not decisive; insufficient discriminative evidence to approve or create.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Traffic light in image is green (vehicles may pass). q0632 asserts 'vehicles prohibited' = Wrong; maps to source 'No' (B). Visual evidence supports 'No'.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Pictogram shows airflow toward face; q0628 top candidate correct = 'front fan works' which matches localized option D ('être soufflé en face'). Strong image+machine agreement.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Red circular sign with black car + diagonal slash clearly indicates motor-vehicles (cars) prohibited — localized option C ('tout type de véhicule') matches. Candidates show conflicting/poor matches; create new to avoid mismapping.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Triangular warning with gate/fence pictogram indicates a manned/guarded level crossing. q0897 corresponds to 'a manned railway crossing' — localized option B = 'passage à niveau sous surveillance'.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: White arrows in a red circle likely instruct to slow down. Image and options do not match any candidate confidently; create new localized item with answer A ('ralentir').
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Green G2 highway plate matches q0760; master meaning is highway name/number and maps to French option C (nom de l'autoroute).

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue rectangular sign with white bus symbol and arrow indicates a bus-only lane. q0720 maps to 'special lane for public buses' and localized option A = 'voie réservée aux bus de transport en commun'.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt asks if signal allows turning into oncoming lane before oncoming vehicle. Candidate q0638 asks similar and has correctRow = Wrong => localized answer 'No' (B). Visual and candidate align sufficiently though some ambiguity remains.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source statement equals candidate q0038 prompt (slow and yield to disabled persons obstructing traffic). Machine match indicates Right/True. French options A=Yes aligns.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image of police hand signals ambiguous. Top machine match (q0899) indicates 'stop' while another candidate (q0727) indicates 'turn left/wait to turn left' and source key B is 'wait before turning left'. Conflicting candidate answers and low visual disambiguation — cannot safely approve.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows red-circled '80' (max) and a blue '50' (minimum/advisory). Statement that max is 50 is false. Candidate q0226 labels statement Wrong; French option B (No) matches.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement 'forbidden to drive while license suspended' matches q0234 (Right/True). French option A=Yes aligns.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Sign image and notes show a height restriction (4 m) with a detour arrow — corresponds to 'bypass if over height' (option D). Top candidate q0739 correct option D.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Scene shows yield sign and vehicle from left; correct behavior is to give way to vehicle on the left. Candidate q0378 indicates 'yield' — French option C matches that meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Top candidate q0393 correct answer is 'no label of inspection' (vehicle detention). French option B refers to missing Controle Technique (inspection certificate) — aligns with q0393.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement 'driver can watch a video while driving if road traffic is good' is unsafe/false. Candidate q0261 labels that Wrong/False. French option B=No matches.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows approach to intersection with cross-hatched area; correct action is stop and wait outside the intersection. Candidate q0418 correct option B corresponds to French option B.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Machine/high-scoring candidate q0526 indicates the instrument does NOT display 6000 rev/min (statement is Wrong). Visual/dashboard evidence and high candidate score support choosing French option B=No.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source statement matches q0340 (same wording about >50% overspeed leading to 12 penalty points). French options map Yes=A (Right).
Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Triangular warning sign with car and two arrows indicates 'watch distance' (source answer A). Top candidate signs do not match this exact road-warning meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text matches q0044 (night driving limited visibility => reduce speed). French Yes=A corresponds to Right.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Scene-specific lane-signal image (middle lane shows green in visual evidence) — statement 'forbidden to circulate in middle lane' is false. No single existing qid clearly matches this exact lane/traffic-light layout.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Machine top candidate (q0893) indicates 'public bus stop' but French options include multiple bus/median variants (B and D) and mapping is ambiguous from image/wording; cannot reliably pick the French letter.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question about passing accumulated water aligns with q0117 ('reduce speed and go slowly'). French option A matches.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0183 corresponds to 'on seeing children-warning sign choose speed carefully' — matches source; French 'ralentir prudemment' = C.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0118 ('stop and wait in line' for congestion) matches source scenario; French 'attendre dans la file' = D.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0362 gives probation period = 12 months. French option B = 12 mois, mapping clear.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image and prompt match q0646 (choose lane with green arrow). French Yes=A corresponds to Right.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks max speed on icy road (options include 30 km/h). Machine top match q0482 asks same concept; master correct = 30 km/h. Local option B = 30 km/h, so map to q0482:B.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Source states turn on hazard + position lights only. Top candidate q0291 adds rear lights (hazard+position+rear). Candidate set conflicts with localized statement (omits rear lights); cannot safely approve or map.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question about where to stop when broken down; machine q0459 correct = 'stop where it will not interfere with traffic'. French option C matches that meaning, so map to q0459:C.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows windshield wiper symbol; machine q0603 correct = windshield wiper. Local option B = front windshield wiper, so map to q0603:B.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement about turning on indicator in advance and merging safely matches q0004 (ROW, correct = Right). Local 'Yes' is option A, so map to A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Before entering an intersection slow down/observe/ensure safety matches q0057 (Right). Local 'Yes' = A, so map to A.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Dashboard icon appears to show an open right door (visual evidence). Candidate qids in top matches disagree (some indicate left door, both doors, trunk, etc.) and top match labels disagree on correct row. Conflicting candidates — cannot safely map.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow rectangular sign 'S203' corresponds to provincial/state/province route. Machine q0659 correct = provincial highway. Local option B = provincial road number, so map to q0659:B.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Asks which system is used besides administrative sanctions; master q0437 correct = accumulated penalty points system. Local option C = demerit/points accumulation system, so map to q0437:C.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question about proper actions on highway; machine q0122 correct = not allowed to drive/stop in emergency lane except in emergency. Local option D matches that meaning, so map to q0122:D.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Prompt asks when hazard warning lights may be used. Options include 'traffic jam' and 'follow preceding vehicles' which are ambiguous across jurisdictions; no clear matching qid in candidates. Keep unresolved until legal/local guideline confirmed (likely only for breakdown/emergency).
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Exact semantic match to master q0151: intermittent gentle depression of brake pedal after wading. Options align and correct answer corresponds to source option D.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Candidate q0358 explicitly states parking on the sidewalk when no parking found is not allowed (Wrong). Source options map 'No' to B — select B. Top-ranked candidate (q0307) was about 50m rule and not as close, so chosen q0358 instead. Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate (q0307) concerned stopping near intersections (50m) which is less semantically close than q0358 about borrowing the sidewalk.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Question about priority on narrow mountain road; candidate set shows conflicting mappings (some candidates say mountain-side first, others say away-from-mountain first). Local option wording (montagne vs à pic) ambiguous; cannot confidently map to existing qid.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Master q0173 asks how headlights change when turning at night; correct meaning 'moves from center to roadside' matches source option D. Good semantic alignment; approve.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Candidate q0593 defines 'What is an airbag?' as an occupant-protection system. Source option D ('protect the driver and passengers') carries same meaning; approve. Note: top-ranked candidate was about seat belt (different), so selected q0593 (rank 2). Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate (q0626) referred to seat belt role, not airbag; q0593 is the correct semantic match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Master q0495 states a driver who flees after causing a (non‑criminal) traffic accident gets a 12‑point penalty. Source option A = '12' so select A. Top candidate differed (q0981) but q0495 is semantically correct. Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate (q0981) concerned forged license; q0495 is the correct match for fleeing-after-accident penalty points.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0492's correct meaning is 'follow the vehicles in front'. Source option D ('wait one behind the other') matches that meaning; approve with locale key D.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0320 explicitly: 'Do not start when door or compartment is not properly closed.' Source 'The driver cannot start before doors and trunk properly closed' is equivalent; source 'Yes' = A is correct.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No candidate in shortlist exactly addresses 'hitting monuments or public installations' obligation to stop/report; source correct answer is 'No' (B). Create new localized question as no clear existing qid matches. Rejected top matcher: Top candidates were not about responsibility after hitting public installations; none matched semantics closely enough to reuse.
